name: Frontend Design
description: Distinctive, intentional UI design guidance — typography, palette, and anti-template aesthetics for web interfaces.

install.cursor: npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design -a codex -g -y
install.vscode: npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design -a github-copilot -g -y
